mapper.select: SELECT * FROM job_offers WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM job_offers WHERE hr_id = #{hrId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT o.* FROM job_offers o INNER JOIN applications a ON o.application_id = a.id INNER JOIN jobs j ON a.job_id = j.id WHERE j.company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
